scope: second deep pass across local short-form vendor repos and current web/open-source references

signals.pattern: Return many scored clip candidates with hooks, reasons, score dimensions, and dedupe groups.
Create a structured scene plan before generating visual, audio, music, and caption assets.
Treat vertical reframing as a tracked creative artifact with subject, crop mode, confidence, and fallback.
Bind caption treatment to archetype and validate readability, timing, emphasis, and platform safe zones.
Track origin, license, owner, allowed use, local copy path, and review status for every production asset.
Verify stock or generated visuals against scene intent and record query rewrites or rejection reasons.
Emit resumable progress, provider, cost, and decision events across the video pipeline.

reject_patterns: mirror, speed, or color shifts to evade copyright detection
third-party platform video reuse without permission
one-shot viral score with no score dimensions or explanation
